remarks: ENDORSEMENT SCHEDULE: 1. CG 24 26 04 13 — Amendment of Aggregate Limits of Insurance - Per Project; 2. IL 00 21 09 08 — Nuclear Energy Liability Exclusion Endorsement; 3. CG 25 03 05 09 — Designated Construction Project(s) General Aggregate Limit; 4. WC 00 01 00 — Workers Compensation and Employers Liability Insurance Policy; 5. CG 24 04 05 09 — Waiver of Transfer of Rights of Recovery Against Others to Us; 6. WC 00 03 01A — Alternate Employer Endorsement. ADDITIONAL INSURED: Additional Insured status is extended to Woodbridge Realty Management Inc. as required by written contract. Coverage is primary and non-contributory. SPECIAL CONDITIONS: Primary and Non-Contributory wording applies per policy endorsement. LOCATION DESCRIPTIONS: LOC-001: Corporate Headquarters — 300 Liberty Avenue, Suite 1200, Pittsburgh, PA 15222 (Occupancy: Office); LOC-002: Main Equipment Yard & Warehouse — 4500 Butler Street, Pittsburgh, PA 15201 (Occupancy: Warehouse); LOC-003: Fabrication Shop — 4520 Butler Street, Pittsburgh, PA 15201 (Occupancy: Manufacturing); LOC-004: South Hills Branch Office — 3000 Village Run Road, Wexford, PA 15090 (Occupancy: Office). SUBCONTRACTOR REQUIREMENTS: Evidence of Workers Compensation coverage is required from all subcontractors prior to commencing work on the project. NATURE OF OPERATIONS: The insured's principal operations consist of: General contracting for commercial and institutional construction — healthcare facilities, educational buildings, and corporate offices throughout Western Pennsylvania. Entity type: Corporation.
